title: Ubiquiti U6-Mesh - UniFi Access Point WiFi 6 Mesh
description: Small, sleek, yet extremely powerful Dual-Band AP with support for the latest Wi-Fi 6 standard 802.11ax is ideal for businesses and homes. The modern and discreet design allows for placement close to users for optimal performance. In the 5 GHz band it achieves transmission speeds of up to 4,800 Mbps (4Ã4 MIMO) and in 2.4 GHz 574 Mbps (2Ã2 MIMO) Suitable for indoor and outdoor use thanks to IPX5 protection. Seamless integration and management with UniFi network solution. The package includes brackets for wall, pole and table mounting Wi-Fi 6 technology - 802.11a/b/g/n/ac/ax 5GHz throughput up to 4,800 Mbps - 160 MHz, 4Ã4 MIMO 2.4GHz throughput up to 574 Mbps - 2Ã2 MIMO 802.3af PoE power WPA3 encryption support Supported by UniFi Network version 6.2.51 and later To manage the device, you need to download the original software called UniFi Network from the official website, which allows you to control the entire network. The undeniable advantage of UniFi Network is that it is completely free without any restrictions ! This central management allows you to upload maps and set basic parameters as well as advanced functions such as SSID, guest account, home page, traffic statistics and list and status of associated clients always easily and quickly Fast Roaming - seamless transition between APs Wireless uplink (useful where you can't get a data cable) Up to 8 SSIDs Detailed traffic statistics Guest Network Load balance - maintaining a balanced load/switching clients Speed limit for each SSID Device Holders - wall, pole, table Cable ties Gigabit PoE power adapter 48 V/0.32 A…
